2603.23016.title: A Sobering Look at Tabular Data Generation via Probabilistic Circuits
2603.23016.paper_summary: Tabular data is more challenging to generate than text and images, due to its heterogeneous features and much lower sample sizes. On this task, diffusion-based models are the current state-of-the-art (SotA) model class, achieving almost perfect performance on commonly used benchmarks. In this paper, we question the perception of progress for tabular data generation. First, we highlight the limitations of current protocols to evaluate the fidelity of generated data, and advocate for alternative ones. Next, we revisit a simple baseline -- hierarchical mixture models in the form of deep probabilistic circuits (PCs) -- which delivers competitive or superior performance to SotA models for a fraction of the cost. PCs are the generative counterpart of decision forests, and as such can natively handle heterogeneous data as well as deliver tractable probabilistic generation and inference. Finally, in a rigorous empirical analysis we show that the apparent saturation of progress for SotA models is largely due to the use of inadequate metrics. As such, we highlight that there is still much to be done to generate realistic tabular data. Code available at https://github.com/april-tools/tabpc.
2603.23016.paper_summary_zh: 表格數據的生成比文本和圖像更具挑戰性，因為其異質特徵和樣本數量較少。在這項任務中，基於擴散的模型是當前的最先進（SotA）模型類別，在常用基準上實現了幾乎完美的性能。在本文中，我們質疑對表格數據生成進展的認知。首先，我們強調當前評估生成數據真實性的協議的局限性，並倡導替代方案。接下來，我們重新審視一個簡單的基線——以深度概率電路（PCs）形式的層次混合模型——其在成本的極小部分下提供與SotA模型相當或更優的性能。PCs是決策森林的生成對應物，因此可以原生處理異質數據，並提供可處理的概率生成和推斷。最後，在一項嚴謹的實證分析中，我們顯示SotA模型進展的明顯飽和主要是由於使用了不適當的指標。因此，我們強調仍然有許多工作需要完成，以生成真實的表格數據。代碼可在 https://github.com/april-tools/tabpc 獲得。
2603.23016.author: Davide Scassola et.al.
2603.23016.authors: Davide Scassola, Dylan Ponsford, Adrián Javaloy, Sebastiano Saccani, Luca Bortolussi, Henry Gouk, Antonio Vergari
